comment: DeepSpeed ZeRO-3 + bf16 config for LoRA continued pretraining of Qwen3.5-27B on 4x A40 48GB. ZeRO-3 is required because the 56 GB bf16 base does not fit a single A40; ZeRO-2 keeps a full base copy per rank and would OOM. Optimizer states + grads exist only for the ~318M LoRA params, so memory for those is trivial. No CPU offload is set on purpose: with 4x A40 and a sharded base (~14 GB/rank), we have enough VRAM for activations at seq_len=4096 and offload would add CPU<->GPU traffic.
